sources.title: Windows Precision Touchpad Collection
supportedClaims: PTP HID Touch Pad usage page 0x0D usage 0x05
Mandatory contact ID, X, Y, tip, confidence, scan time, contact count
Optional pressure, width, height, azimuth, mechanical force, buttons
Contact count maximum minimum 3 maximum 5
Tip switch independent lift semantics
Button types click-pad pressure-pad discrete-pad
Scan time units 100 microseconds

sources.title: Sample Report Descriptors (Windows Precision Touchpad)
supportedClaims: Sample HID report layout for contacts and buttons
Mouse TLC companion collection pattern
Optional latency mode and haptics feature reports

sources.title: Required HID Top-Level Collections (Precision Touchpad)
supportedClaims: Mandatory PTP collection and Configuration collection

sources.title: GetPointerFrameInfo function (winuser.h)
supportedClaims: Retrieve entire multi-pointer frame for current message
Windows 8+ desktop apps
Frame ownership limited to same window
History available via GetPointerFrameInfoHistory

sources.title: GetPointerTouchpadInfo functions (Winuser.h)
supportedClaims: GetPointerTouchpadInfo and GetPointerFrameTouchpadInfo retrieve POINTER_TOUCH_INFO for touchpad pointers
Must process WM_POINTER after RegisterTouchpadCapableWindow/Thread
Minimum client Windows 11 desktop
Pixel location fields freeze at gesture-start cursor; himetric fields hold device-relative contact position
Frame variants return all currently-active contacts for the target
Docs carry pre-released product disclaimer

sources.title: RegisterTouchpadCapableWindow and RegisterTouchpadCapableThread functions
supportedClaims: Registers window or thread as touchpad-capable
Enables WM_POINTER for touchpad two-finger gestures (pans and zooms)
DefWindowProc converts those messages to mouse wheel if not consumed
GetPointerDevices includes touchpads when thread is capable
Windows 11 desktop minimum; pre-released product disclaimer

sources.title: Precision Touchpad Input (Win32 portal)
supportedClaims: Apps do not receive gesturing touchpad input by default
RegisterTouchpadCapable + GetPointerTouchpadInfo for higher-fidelity two-finger gestures
Default path often becomes mouse wheel via ninput.dll
Also documents inertia reporting, multi-finger controllers, and injection APIs

sources.title: About Raw Input
supportedClaims: RegisterRawInputDevices required to receive WM_INPUT
HID devices addressable by usage page and usage

sources.title: RegisterRawInputDevices function
supportedClaims: API to register raw input devices for WM_INPUT

sources.title: Pointer Events Level 3
sources.license: W3C Software and Document Notice and License
supportedClaims: W3C Recommendation status as of 30 June 2026 (dated TR REC-pointerevents3-20260630)
Supersedes Pointer Events Level 2 on the TR track
Unified pointer model for mouse pen touch
PE3 features include altitudeAngle azimuthAngle pointerrawupdate coalesced and predicted events
No dedicated trackpad dual absolute coordinate model
Recommendation status does not imply universal browser implementation of every PE3 feature

sources.title: Pointer Events Level 3 publication history
supportedClaims: Publication ladder from FPWD 2019 through WD/CR/CRD 2020-2026 to Recommendation 30 June 2026

sources.title: Extend pointer events to support raw trackpad data #206
supportedClaims: Raw multi-touch trackpad coordinates requested as future scenario
Not delivered as standard dual-foot pad API

sources.title: Building a great touchpad experience for the web with Pointer Events
supportedClaims: EdgeHTML 17 PTP pointer events
Two-finger pan exposed as single contact at cursor
Browser optimization for pan zoom rotate not free dual feet

sources.title: Device access blocking: consider making way for touchpads/digitizers #125
supportedClaims: Windows digitizers often exclusive to Raw Input Manager
WebHID not a reliable path for system touchpads

sources.title: Rapier JavaScript Getting Started
supportedClaims: npm packages rapier3d and compat variants
world.step game loop pattern
debugRender for integration

sources.title: Rapier Determinism
supportedClaims: Local determinism default
Cross-platform determinism requires enhanced-determinism feature
Incompatible with parallel and simd features
IEEE 754-2008 compliance required

sources.title: @dimforge/rapier2d-deterministic npm package readme excerpt
supportedClaims: Published deterministic npm flavors for Rapier JS bindings

sources.title: Get Control! (skate. Flick-It)
sources.license: EA site terms; game trademarks EA
supportedClaims: Flick-It: left stick steer, right stick flip/board adjustments
Gesture flicks produce ollie kickflip shuvit family
Franchise control philosophy of expressive stick flicks

sources.title: three.js
supportedClaims: WebGL/WebGPU 3D library suitable for browser and WebView

sources.title: gltfpack (meshoptimizer)
supportedClaims: glTF optimization and meshopt compression
three.js loader support via setMeshoptDecoder

sources.title: Poly Haven
supportedClaims: CC0 HDRIs textures models catalog candidates

sources.title: Kenney Assets
supportedClaims: CC0 prototype game assets including environment kits

sources.title: KTX-Software / toktx
supportedClaims: KTX2 texture encoding tools for GPU-compressed textures

sources.title: Microsoft Edge WebView2
supportedClaims: Embed Chromium-based WebView in native Windows hosts

sources.title: Local PnP enumeration of touchpad devices (research machine)
supportedClaims: HID-compliant touch pad present
I2C HID Device ACPI VEN_06CB present
Synaptics vendor ID 0x06CB on research laptop

sources.title: Windows Pointing Device Support in Firefox
supportedClaims: Precision Touchpad raw touch data interpreted by Windows
Browser engine considerations for multi-device pointer stacks
